title: Gods and Heroes (Palladium)
description:
Choose to become a hero, a legend, a god.
Powers: Speedster (Flash), Kryptonian (Superman), Jumper (Teleporter)
body:
# ✨ Gods & Heroes ✨

Live the fantasy you always dreamed of — **become your favorite hero or a legendary god!**  
Choose between the greatest superheroes and gods that have ever walked the earth! 🌍⚡

## 🔥 Current Gods and Heroes:

1. 🚀 **Speedster (The Flash)** — *Version: 1.8* (Additions in 1.2.1)
2. 🛡️ **Kryptonian (Superman)** — *Version: 1.8* (Rework in 1.2.1)
3. 🌌 **Jumper (Teleporter)** — *Version: 1.8*
4. ⚙️ **Engineer (Create Mod)** — *Version: 1.2.1*
5. 🔮 **Mage (Ars Nouveau)** — *Version: 1.2.1*
6. 🏗️ **Builder (God of Construction)** — *Version: 1.2.1*
7. 🔎 **Size Shifter** — *Version: 1.4*
8. 📚 **Iron Mage (Iron's Spellbooks)** — *Version: 1.4*

---

## ⚠️ Important Warnings:

- **If you want to play __without Origins__, you must download version 1.1.8!**  
- **From version 1.2 and above, you __NEED__ to download __Origins__ to play**
- **From version 1.4 and above, you do __NOT__ need to download GH-Powers anymore!**

---

## 🌟 Future Additions (Already Planned):

- 🐺 **Shape Shifter**  
- 🧚 **Fairy**  
- ⛏️ **God of Mines**

---

## 🔧 Expected Improvements:


- Create an official Modpack & Open a MC Server (and a Lite version) featuring this mod.

---

## 💬 Join the Community!

Have suggestions or questions? Feel free to join our Discord server:  
👉 [https://discord.gg/EEmXHvkt3g]
